---
title: "NODE_ENV"
description: "Standard Node.js environment indicator. Set to `production` in prod."
---

# `NODE_ENV`

**Read by:** `athena`, `hera`, `sdk`, `site`

**Sensitive:** No — safe to log / share.

**Required:** yes

## Purpose

Standard Node.js environment indicator. Set to `production` in prod.

## Where it's read

- **athena** — `grep -r "NODE_ENV" ../athena/src` for code locations
- **hera** — `grep -r "NODE_ENV" ../hera/src` for code locations
- **sdk** — `grep -r "NODE_ENV" ../sdk/src` for code locations
- **site** — `grep -r "NODE_ENV" ../site/src` for code locations

## Setting it

### Dev

Set in your local `.env.dev` file (managed by `octl deploy`).

### Prod

```bash
gh secret set NODE_ENV --body "<value>" -R OlympusOSS/platform
gh workflow run deploy.yml
```
